description: Monthly Salary - Base for 50/30/20 Budget Allocation
50% Needs: Food Budget (30% of Needs = 15% of Salary)
50% Needs: Transport Budget (20% of Needs = 10% of Salary)
50% Needs: Utilities Budget (20% of Needs = 10% of Salary)
50% Needs: Health Budget (30% of Needs = 15% of Salary)
30% Wants: Entertainment Budget (60% of Wants = 18% of Salary)
30% Wants: Shopping Budget (40% of Wants = 12% of Salary)
20% Savings: Emergency Fund (50% of Savings = 10% of Salary)
20% Savings: Investments (30% of Savings = 6% of Salary)
20% Savings: Future Goals (20% of Savings = 4% of Salary)
